column26: Mindoro March 13 -> March 14 public spill-extent reinitialization validation
column43: The separate phase1_mindoro_focus_pre_spill_2016_2023 Mindoro-focused drifter rerun selected the same recipe used by the stored B1 run (cmems_era5). It now serves as the active Mindoro-specific recipe-provenance lane for B1 without rewriting the original March 13 -> March 14 raw-generation history.
column44: Phase 3B observation-based spatial validation using public Mindoro spill extents now foregrounds the March 13 NOAA seed polygon and March 14 NOAA target through the completed OpenDrift R1 previous p50 branch. The base March 3 -> March 6 case definition remains frozen in config, this promoted row is authorized by a separate Phase 3B amendment, and the separate focused 2016-2023 Mindoro drifter rerun now supplies the active cmems_era5 recipe provenance without rewriting the stored run provenance.
